introduction.description: Question Bank (QB) is the reservoir where various types of questions are created, stored and maintained. Questions are drawn from this reserve for creating different types of assessments.

add_category.description: QB has the facility to create categories and sub-categories as many times and levels as required.
steps: User clicks 'Create Category' button
System shows multiple entry fields to enter category names
User enters names of categories and saves
System creates list of categories and shows for subcategory creation
User selects category name and clicks
System shows multiple entry fields to enter subcategory names
System creates list of subcategories and shows for next level subcategory creation
Process repeats as many levels as required
User selects 'View Category' button
System shows list of categories and subcategories
User selects category/subcategory to be edited
System shows edit field
User edits and saves
System shows updated category list

rules: To delete a category/subcategory, user needs permission from Admin
steps: User selects 'View Category' button
System shows list of categories and subcategories
User selects category/subcategory and clicks 'Delete Request' button
System asks user to confirm the request
User confirms the action
System sends 'Request to delete category' message to the Admin
If user clicks 'Cancel': System cancels the request
System shows updated category list post deletion/cancellation

SME_question_creation.description: SME receives question creation tasks from Admin. System shows pending task notifications on sign-in.

steps: User clicks 'Add Question' button
System shows list of Categories/subcategories
User selects appropriate category/subcategory
System shows list of question types
User selects the question type
System shows relevant entry fields for the question type
User enters/uploads question inputs and submits
System shows preview of the question
User clicks 'Save' button
System saves data in temporary folder (NOT attached to QB at this stage)

rules: User does NOT have access to any other users' questions or the Question Bank
steps: User selects 'View Question' button
System shows list of categories or tasks
User selects relevant category or task
System shows list of questions under selected category/task
User selects question to be edited
System shows edit fields
User edits and submits
System shows preview
User clicks 'Save'
System shows updated question list

rules: User does NOT have access to any other users' questions or the Question Bank
steps: User selects 'View Question' button
System shows options to sort by category or task
User selects option
System shows list of categories or tasks
User selects relevant category/task
System shows list of questions
User selects question and clicks 'Delete' button
System asks user to confirm
User confirms or cancels
System shows updated question list

SME_review_response.trigger: Reviewer sends back questions for review
steps: User checks notifications and clicks 'Review Request' button
System displays list of questions for review
User clicks on a question
System shows question in Edit template with reviewer comments
User edits the question and submits
System shows preview
User clicks 'Save'
System shows updated question list
When task is complete: User submits the task; System sends it for review
When review task is complete: User submits the review task; System sends it for review

standard_questions.description: Used in academic performance testing, aptitude/ability testing, or skill testing

subtypes.name: Text-image mixed
subtypes.description: Either question or options are text or image

subtypes.name: Audio-based
subtypes.description: Question has audio clip played, followed by text questions with MCQ text/image options

subtypes.name: Video-based
subtypes.description: Question has video clip played, followed by text questions with MCQ text/image options

subtypes.name: Paragraph-based
subtypes.description: Question includes a paragraph, followed by text questions with MCQ text options

subtypes.name: Hotspot
subtypes.description: Question is text and options are hotspots on an image; end user clicks on hotspot

subtypes.name: Flash-based
subtypes.description: Question involves list of words/images flashed at specified interval, followed by text questions with MCQ text/image options

subtypes.name: Text-based
subtypes.description: Question is text, option is text entry

subtypes.name: Image-based
subtypes.description: Question is image, option is text entry

subtypes.name: Audio-based
subtypes.description: Question has audio clip played, followed by text questions with text entry option

subtypes.name: Video-based
subtypes.description: Question has video clip played, followed by text questions with text entry option

subtypes.name: Paragraph-based
subtypes.description: Question includes a paragraph, followed by text questions with text entry option

subtypes.name: Flash-based
subtypes.description: Question involves list of words/images flashed at specified interval, followed by text questions with text entry option

psychometric_questions.description: Simply words, phrases or statements (always text based) without answer options
psychometric_questions.note: Variants are defined at Assessment Configuration stage. At question creation, only text entry is involved.

content_review.description: Reviewer receives review tasks from Admin. System shows pending task notifications on sign-in.
steps: User clicks 'Content Review' button
System shows question list specified in the task
User clicks on a question
System shows all parameters of the question as entered by SME
User reviews the question and selects one of: Send Back or Approve
If Send Back: System shows entry field for reason/comment; User enters and submits
If Approve: System shows entry fields for approval comment; User enters and submits
System displays 5-point rating scale (1-5) for content quality rating
User selects rating and submits
System sends question for psychometric review

psychometric_review.description: Psychometrician receives review tasks from Admin. System shows pending task notifications on sign-in.
steps: User clicks 'Psychometric Review' button
System shows question list specified in the task
User clicks on a question
System shows all parameters as entered by SME and Reviewer
User reviews and selects: Send Back or Approve
If Send Back: System shows entry field for reason/comment; User enters and submits; System sends back to SME
If Approve: System shows entry fields for approval comment; User enters comments
System displays 5-point rating scale (1-5) for content quality AND entry field to specify exposure limit
User selects rating, enters exposure limit, and submits
System sends questions to Question Bank (Questions are NOW attached to QB)
rules: Questions saved at this stage are attached to the Question Bank
psychometric_review.exposure_limit_definition: The number of times a question is displayed to an end user

steps: User clicks 'Psychometric Analysis' button
System shows two options: Automatic Analysis or Manual Analysis
User selects Automatic Analysis
System shows filter options (Category, Time Period, Region, User Age range, Question ID)
User specifies filter criteria and clicks 'Extract'
System extracts and lists questions
User views and selects questions (individually or 'select all')
System displays options for type of analysis
User selects analyses (Item difficulty, Item Discrimination, Item Total) and submits
System performs analyses and returns outputs
User inspects outputs and submits or cancels
If cancelled: System returns to previous screen
When submitted: System stores output values against respective questions
User selects Manual Analysis
System shows filter options
User specifies filter criteria and clicks 'Extract'
System extracts and displays question list
User views and selects questions
System displays option to download questions with user data
After performing analyses manually: User uploads output values or manually enters values
System stores output values against respective questions

question_exposure_setting.description: User sets the limit for question exposure. When exposure limit is reached, question becomes inactive automatically.
steps: User clicks 'Exposure Limit' button
System shows filter options
User specifies filter criteria and clicks 'Extract'
System extracts questions and shows entry field to specify exposure limit
User views questions, sets exposure limit, and submits
System saves questions with exposure limit values

QB_updation.description: User conducts periodic review of categories and their questions.
steps: System shows filter options including Question Expiry and Psychometric Values
User specifies filter criteria and clicks 'Extract'
System extracts and displays question list
User reviews and selects questions
User clicks 'Activate' or 'Inactivate' as required
If removal needed: User selects questions; System shows selected list; User clicks 'Request to Delete'
System sends notification to Admin with request and question list
If Admin approves: System removes questions from QB
If Admin does not approve: System retains questions in original positions
